ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-15-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Aug-12-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Nils Rosenquest, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Neil Gelineau, who was placed under oath and testified.
Michael Gray, witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Mark Walsh.
Default entered against defendant Mark Walsh on May 14, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, July 8, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Neil Gelineau, and against the Defaulted Defendant Mark Walsh as follows:

Damages/Principal - $454,583.06.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,728.84.
Costs - $524.50, for a total of $460,836.40.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Ntcof App And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-26-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Neil Gelineau's Application and Hearing for Right to attach Order and for Issuance of Writ of Attachment, is taken off calendar, at the request of the moving party. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntcof App And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment

No appearance. Plaintiff Neil Gelineau's application for right to attach and for issuance of writ of attachment, is continued to May 27, 2008 at 10:30 a.m., at the request of the moving party. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ex Parte Application For A Right To Attach Order And Temporary Protective Order
Off Calendar Apr-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Nils Rosenquest, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Neil Gelineau

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Neil Gelineau's ex parte application for a right to attach order or temporary protective order is granted in part.
The Court will issue a temporary protective order so that plaintiff may file and serve a noticed application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
